summary: Phase 3B: Suppression + Cooldown Engine (Foundational Layer). Creates lcs.suppression_registry (CANONICAL, CTB-registered, 1 row per sovereign_id, no-DELETE, UPDATE-allowed governance surface). Replaces fn_mid_suppression_check stub with real implementation: resolves sovereign from mid_ledger, checks global_suppressed and cooldown_until, returns FALSE if blocked, TRUE if clear. fn_mark_mid_ready (Phase 3A) already wired — no modification needed. 11 enforcement tests across 3 categories.
